title: Tenant Satisfaction Measures 2024/25
body: "TSMs are intended to be a tool to allow tenants to scrutinise their landlord’s performance, give insights to landlords on where they might look to improve their services, and provide a source of intelligence to the regulator on how far landlords are meeting the outcomes of the consumer standards.  Almost half a million tenant perception surveys were completed by landlords in order to generate TSMs. This represents a rich and important source of feedback from tenants to their landlords.  "

taxons.title: Housing for older and vulnerable people
